ItacPersonItem.Notes: For Borghesi`s relationship with Scipione Gonzaga and his involvment with the Eterei Academy, see the biography by Gian Luigi Beccaria in DBI (1971), and Ricco`, La `miniera` accademica` (2002).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
